title: SaaS B2B with buyer persona and objections (EN)
rationale: B2B SaaS service in English with explicit buyer persona, objections list, free-trial CTA. Tests offer_type='service' classification + LinkedIn-first channel reasoning + EN locale.
notes: Buyer persona + objections explicit → audience_fit should be solid. Free trial CTA → strong-ish CTA.

input.raw_offer_text: Productiv — AI task manager for solo founders and tiny teams. Turns 10 lines of rough notes into a structured weekly plan with smart reminders. Free 14-day trial, then $29/month.
input.target_customer: Solo founders and 2-person teams, $80k-300k revenue, frustrated with Notion and Asana, English-speaking
proof_points: Featured Product Hunt #2 of the day
customer_objections: I already have Notion / Asana / Todoist
$29/month feels expensive for a to-do app
input.desired_cta: Start free trial — no credit card

must_pass: intelligence.audience_fit_score above default thanks to explicit persona
